characters.name: Goibniu

classes.name: Cleric
classes.subclassDescription: The twilit transition from light into darkness often brings calm and even joy, as the day’s labors end and the hours of rest begin. The darkness can also bring terrors, but the gods of twilight guard against the horrors of the night.

characters.otherNotes:
Xp points: 11 + 40 + 15 + 10 - 65 = 11 remaining.

Hybrid form is Large.

When using blood rite, if rolling a 19 or 20 on attack, get an extra die of damage.


While transformed, you can expend the following actions (= proficiency bonus per long rest): 1. give an encouraging howl to allies = pick three allies in range, including self. Those three allies gain pack tactics this turn. 


Man destroyed the world for coin, power, truth, and magic, all for nothing. (Rose spirits)

characters.name: Aria Mao

classes.name: Rogue
classes.subclassDescription:
Practice the Grim Art of Death

An Assassin’s training focuses on using stealth, poison, and disguise to eliminate foes with deadly efficiency.

characters.personalityTraits:
I have my own ideas about what is and is not food, and I find the eating habits of those around me fascinating, confusing, or revolting.
I have different assumptions from those around me concerning personal space, blithely invading others’ space in innocence, or reacting to ignorant invasion of my own.
characters.ideals:
Reserved. As someone new to these strange lands, I am cautious and respectful in my dealings. (Lawful)
Cunning. Though I may not know their ways, neither do they know mine, which can be to my advantage. (Evil)
Suspicious. I must be careful, for I have no way of telling friend from foe here. (Any)
characters.bonds:
I’m fascinated by the beauty and wonder of this new land.
My freedom is my most precious possession. I’ll never let anyone take it from me again.
characters.flaws:
I pretend not to understand the local language in order to avoid interactions I would rather not have.
I have a weakness for the new intoxicants and other pleasures of this land.

characters.name: Lilian Brooks Esquire

classes.name: Druid
classes.subclassDescription:
Craft Effigies of Sacrifice and Protection

Cunning in their ancient art, Druids of the Circle of Wicker fashion twig dolls and effigies, binding their magic into these crude forms. These creations often resemble animals, rune shapes, natural symbols, or people.

Protective tokens and promises of retribution against trespassers are these Druids’ stock in trade. You can weave the magic of the land through your wicker creations as boons to your friends and banes to your foes.

actions: Font of Magic: Convert Spell Slots
Font of Magic: Create Spell Slot Level 1

classes.name: Ranger
classes.subclassDescription:
Channel the Wrath of the Wilds

In the areas of Etharis where nature still holds sway, many cling to the ancient customs of woodland hunters and witches. Marking themselves with wild plants and bone needles, theirs is a tradition of cunning, cruelty, and reprisal against all trespassers. Unlike the Druids, these wood witches twist natural magic into hexes, imbuing their weapons with nature’s fury.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.subclassDescription:
Purge Sickness with Suffering

The Purification Domain believes sickness, mutation, and other forms of bodily corruption are signs of a corresponding spiritual malady. Virtue can’t exist alongside impurity. The wickedness of humanity and other mortal, sentient creatures is a contagion that manifests plagues such as the Weeping Pox. When there’s a risk of such corruption spreading, there’s only one surefire way to contain the rot and atone for the sins that led to this point: Burn it out.

characters.name: Soren

classes.name: Barbarian
classes.subclassDescription:
The Path of the Totem Warrior is a spiritual journey, as the barbarian accepts a spirit animal as guide, protector, and inspiration. In battle, your totem spirit fills you with supernatural might, adding magical fuel to your barbarian rage.

In some barbarians’ tribes, a totem animal is considered to be kin to a particular clan. In such cases, it is unusual for an individual to have more than one totem animal spirit, though exceptions exist.

characters.personalityTraits: Initially distant and cold, but when once she considers someone her family, she's loyal and fiercely protective. Due to the harsh conditions of her homeland, she's inflexible and stuck in her ways since they were essential to survival.
characters.ideals:
Family and loyalty. Her sense of duty to her tribe and peoples.
Greater Good. It is each person’s responsibility to make the most happiness for the whole tribe. (Good)
Might. The strongest are meant to rule. (Evil)
characters.bonds: My family, clan, or tribe is the most important thing in my life, even when they are far from me.
characters.flaws:
Stubborn and inflexible. Prejudiced from life on the tundra.
I am slow to trust members of other races, tribes, and societies.
characters.otherNotes:
Cleave
The Cleave property allows you to use heavy weapons to hit multiple opponents with one massive swing. Whenever you hit a creature with a Melee Weapon Attack, you can make another Melee Attack Roll to hit a second creature you can see within 5ft of the first. On a hit, your second target takes damage equal to the weapon without any additional Ability Modifier damage (unless your modifier is negative). Ideal for crowd control situations, the cleave property is a go-to for those looking to carve through large swaths of enemies.

characters.name: Lazlo Duskfeather

classes.name: Bard
classes.subclassDescription:
Sing the Songs of the Dead

Performing macabre melodies filled with grief-stricken chords and mournful refrains, the College of Requiems stirs the very bones of the dead. Requiem Bards weave necromantic magic into their funerary songs to control and empower a host of Undead minions.

characters.personalityTraits: There is always hope. I will never give up or lose my sense of whimsy.
characters.ideals: Nature and her creatures must be protected. The creatures that have fallen to the ill will of others should have a chance to rise up and avenge themselves.
characters.bonds: I care for those that I bring back to life with my magical song. Though they are dead, their stories are not.
characters.flaws: I am short-sighted and impulsive. My luck and charisma carry me through life.
characters.backstory: Was born in the Feywild with a penchant for mischief and the macabre. I was drawn to the Feydark, its song resonated with me. I learned its song and found power in it. Joined the Witchlight Carnival when they visited. Traveled to the Material Plane with them and ended up near a small village in Nightlund. The village was destroyed by the dragon army. The carnival left without me in the chaos and I became stranded. I traveled far and wide to find help or a settlement, but everything for miles was smoldering ash until I found a military encampment. The commander was Bakaris the Younger. I took refuge with them, but the camp was pillaged by the dragon army and they left no survivors. I used my magic to bring Bakaris back to life as a zombie in my care and journeyed to the capital.
characters.otherNotes: The songs I play are dirges and requiems. When I use polymorph, my form is that of a zombified beast.
